name: python3-ldap3-bleeding-edge
title: python3-ldap3-bleeding-edge
summary: Pure Python LDAP client library (bleeding-edge fork)
description:
Pure Python LDAP client library (bleeding-edge fork)
A pure Python 3 LDAP version 3 strictly conforming to RFC4511 released under
the LGPL v3 open source license. RFC4511 is the current LDAP specification
(June 2006) from IETF and obsoletes the previous LDAP RFCs 2251, 2830, 3771
(December 1997)
.
This package contains the Python 3.x version of the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-ldap3-bleeding-edge because Pure Python LDAP client library (bleeding-edge fork).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-ldap3-bleeding-edge as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-ldap3-bleeding-edge with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-ldap3-bleeding-edge --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
